nodes.name: 判断参数是否完整传入

parameters.query:
select * from mes.machine_data md
where md.procedure_detail_id in (select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd where pd.procedure_name in('SN与UUID绑定','物料解除绑定'))
and (LOWER(md.data ->>'bind_id')=LOWER('{{ $json.uuid }}')or LOWER(md.data ->>'unbind_id')=LOWER('{{ $json.uuid }}'))
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

nodes.name: 查找该uuid是否绑定过(解绑的情况也包含)

workflowId.cachedResultName: 1.Mes重构 — 工序查询通用接口

parameters.query:
select pm.product_model_name from mes.joborder j 
join mes.product_info pi2 on j.product_id = pi2.product_id
join mes.product_model pm on pm.product_model_id = pi2.product_model_id
where j.joborder_id ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_id }}'

value.retroid_id: ={{ $('查找该uuid是否绑定过(解绑的情况也包含)').item.json.retroid_id }}

nodes.name: 维修工单的物料号和sn工单的物料号不一致

parameters.query:
select hpl.procedure_detail_id  from mes.joborder j 
join mes.history_procedure_list hpl on j.history_procedure_list_id = hpl.history_procedure_list_id
where j.joborder_id ='{{ $json.body.joborder_id }}'

nodes.name: 工单对应的工艺流程不包含维修工序
判断维修工单的color 和sn工单的color 是否一致1

parameters.query:
select pi2.product_color  from mes.retroid r 
join mes.joborder j on j.joborder_id =r.joborder_id
join mes.product_info pi2 on pi2.product_id = j.product_id

where r.retroid ='{{ $json.sn }}'

select pi2.product_color  from 
 mes.joborder j 
join mes.product_info pi2 on pi2.product_id = j.product_id
where j.joborder_id ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_id }}'
